advancement.galacticwars.onboarding.cred: Credit Chips hire troops and fund Command Center operations. Your Command Center recipe is now unlocked.
advancement.galacticwars.onboarding.comm: Place the Command Center, then choose your permanent faction pledge in the console that opens.
advancement.galacticwars.onboarding.fact: Carry Credit Chips, find a recruit from your faction, and interact with them to sign a contract.
advancement.galacticwars.onboarding.firs: Use Command Center Operations and a Tactical Command Marker to equip, assign, build with, and command your squad in-world.
item.galacticwars.b1_battle_droid_spawn_: B1 Battle Droid Recruit Spawn Egg
item.galacticwars.b2_super_battle_droid_: B2 Super Battle Droid Spawn Egg
screen.galacticwars.faction_selection.su: Your choice determines your kingdom, recruits, equipment, and campaign.
screen.galacticwars.faction_selection.wa: This choice is permanent once your faction is pledged.
screen.galacticwars.faction_selection.ch: Select a faction to review its battlefield doctrine
screen.galacticwars.faction_selection.su: Pledge sent — the server is validating your Command Center
screen.galacticwars.faction_selection.de: Disciplined clone formations, Jedi support, logistics, and combined-arms vehicles
Massed droid armies, heavy firepower, automation, and rapid battlefield production
Elite mobile warriors, beskar resilience, precision fire, and aggressive deployments
Credits, trade networks, bounty hunters, smugglers, and flexible underworld tactics
Force-infused skirmishers, resilient warbands, ranged hunters, and ritual support

screen.galacticwars.operations.no_kingdo: No kingdom is linked to this Command Center.
All available campaign chapters are complete.
Keep expanding: deploy vehicles, run trade routes, and recapture contested regions.
screen.galacticwars.operations.objective: Place a Command Center and choose your faction pledge.
Activate your placed Command Center to found the kingdom.
Find a Clone Trooper and hire it with physical Credit Chips.
Find a B1 Battle Droid and hire it with physical Credit Chips.
Find a Mandalorian Warrior and hire it with physical Credit Chips.
Find a Hutt Enforcer and hire it with physical Credit Chips.
Find a Nightsister Acolyte and hire it with physical Credit Chips.
Mark registered kingdom storage as the Courier source, then mark a destination chest inside your claimed worksite and let one delivery finish.
Prepare a Forward Base projector, supply its materials, and let a builder finish it.
Prepare and complete a Supply Depot from the Construction tab.
Use Command Center navigation to travel to Kamino.
Use Command Center navigation to travel to Geonosis.
Use Command Center navigation to travel to Tatooine.
Use Command Center navigation to travel to Coruscant.
Complete a Mandalorian Armorer trade for Beskar.
Complete an in-world merchant trade using physical items.
Fabricate a vehicle kit at the Command Center, then deploy it in-world.
Bring your squad to a regional objective and hold it until control changes.
Find and hire a Bounty Hunter recruit.
Find and hire a Mandalorian Marksman recruit.
Find and hire a Smuggler recruit.

galacticwars.configuration.title: Galactic Wars: Clone Wars Configs
config.galacticwars.title: Galactic Wars Configuration
config.galacticwars.group.foundation.des: Startup diagnostics and foundational content switches.
Server-authoritative damage permissions. Dedicated servers use their own galacticwars-common.toml.
config.galacticwars.option.log_startup.d: Log Galactic Wars foundation setup during common startup.
config.galacticwars.option.allow_blaster: Allow player blaster bolts to damage owned, same-faction, or allied recruits.
Allow player-fired blaster bolts to damage other players.
config.galacticwars.option.allow_class_p: Allow non-Force class abilities to directly affect other players.
config.galacticwars.option.allow_force_p: Allow Force abilities to directly affect other players.
